claim_support.reason: Material claims regarding revenue growth and FCF margin are not supported by the underlying data. The report claims -7.53% YoY revenue growth against Q2 2024, but the math indicates +38% YoY; the -7.53% figure corresponds to QoQ growth. Similarly, FCF margin is claimed for Q2 2025 but evidence supports Q1 2025.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Severe numerical errors identified. Revenue growth is mislabeled as YoY (-7.53%) when comparing Q2 2025 to Q2 2024 (actual YoY is ~+38%); the figure represents QoQ decline. FCF margin (0.47%) is attributed to Q2 2025 but calculation evidence explicitly states Q1 2025.

citation_precision.reason: Citations are provided for claims, but there is a mismatch between the text description and the cited calculation content (e.g., citing a Q1 FCF calc for a Q2 claim, citing a YoY label for a QoQ calculation). The IDs are present, but the interpretation of the cited material is inaccurate.

temporal_validity.reason: No post-as-of date violations detected. All news and financial periods cited (Q2 2025, March 2025 earnings) are historical relative to the report as-of date of 2025-04-02.

consistency.reason: Severe internal inconsistency regarding revenue growth. Recent Developments section states -7.53% decline 'from Q1 2025', while Financial Analysis section states -7.53% YoY change 'from Q2 2024 base period'. Both cannot be true for the same percentage.

financial_numeric.reason: Skipped because the report failed the Accuracy Gate due to severe unsupported claims, numerical errors, inconsistencies.
